domainArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the domain.

caseRules.description: A list of detailed case rule information.

unprocessedCaseRules.description: A list of unprocessed case rule identifiers.

caseRuleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the case rule.

rule.description: Represents what rule type should take place, under what conditions.

required.description: Required rule type, used to indicate whether a field is required.

defaultValue.description: The value of the rule (that is, whether the field is required) should none of the conditions evaluate to true.

conditions.description: List of conditions for the required rule; the first condition to evaluate to true dictates the value of the rule.

fieldOptions.description: Which options are available in a child field based on the selected value in a parent field.

parentFieldId.description: The identifier of the parent field that controls options.

childFieldId.description: The identifier of the child field whose options are controlled.

parentChildFieldOptionsMappings.description: A mapping between a parent field option value and child field option values.

hidden.description: Whether a field is visible, based on values in other fields.

defaultValue.description: Whether the field is hidden when no conditions match.

conditions.description: A list of conditions that determine field visibility.

deleted.description: Indicates whether the resource has been deleted.

lastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp when the resource was created or last modified.
